kto — Knowledge to Obsidian

Read first:
- AGENTS.md — canonical repo guidance for humans and AI agents
- GUARDRAILS.md — safety and invariants
- README.md — product overview and user-facing workflow

Operational docs:
- RUNBOOK.md — commands and debugging shortcuts
- TESTING.md — validation commands and test focus areas
- CONTRIBUTING.md — contribution expectations

Key code files:
- package.json — scripts and package metadata
- bin/install.cjs — installer and runtime asset setup
- bin/kto-tools.cjs — provider detection and init context helper
- src/index.ts — runner orchestration
- src/config.ts — config loading and validation
- src/knowledge-validator.ts — graph/wiki contract validation
- src/types.ts — knowledge model types

Prompt/runtime assets:
- commands/kto/*.md — slash-command workflows
- agents/*.md — runtime agent contracts

Key tests:
- tests/config.test.ts
- tests/kto-tools.test.ts
- tests/types.test.ts
- tests/knowledge-validator.test.ts
- tests/core-pages-navigation.test.ts
- tests/english-only-generated-content.test.ts
- tests/index.test.ts

Important invariants:
- `.kto/config.json` is authoritative
- generated markdown is English-only
- only AUTO-GENERATED blocks may be overwritten
- core pages are mandatory: Overview, Architecture, Index, Run_Log
- writeback must stay explicit

Ignore by default unless the task requires them:
- briefing/
- node_modules/
- dist/
